title: PR 102 snagging commit landed
body: Committed the PR 102 snagging bundle as e8050400 (fix(agent-tools): clear PR 102 snagging blockers). Pre-commit blocking hooks passed: format check, markdownlint check, knip, depcruise, and turbo type-check/lint/test. Commit-skill advisory fitness pre-screen still reports the known out-of-scope Practice Core character-budget hard signal; no Practice Core edits were made.
